visa_types.overview:
Overview
Residence permit for FAMILY REUNIFICATION
	Applicant going for family reunification purpose need to apply for the given category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Residence permit for FAMILY REUNIFICATION
	Applicant going for family reunification purpose need to apply for the given category.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Employment / Work]
Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of PKR 3652/- /- per application
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash) for Pakistan.
The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
The visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
Kindly refer to schedule an appointment page on this website for detailed information

## Documents Required
Family Reunification

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit your application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General 
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure: 
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3 x 4 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Grup Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
- Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 2 weeks to 6 months, provided that a complete file is submitted.
Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Pakistan.

## Download Forms
Please Click here  to fill the online Visa form.
Please fill out the Appendix Form
For Minors please fill out this Appendix Form

i) Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists

Visit of family members or friends 
*All supporting documents must not be older than 1 month

visa_types.processing_time:
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 15 working days, provided that a complete file is submitted. However, taking into account the additional days VFS needs to deliver/collect files at the Embassy, we recommend submitting your application at least 20 days before your intended date of departure. Please note: the processing time may extend to 45 days without specific reasons.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Pakistan.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category; for more information on this, kindly refer to the documents required page.
Family members of EU/EEA dependents can directly contact the embassy for appointments and information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category; for more information on this, kindly refer to the documents required page.
Family members of EU/EEA dependents can directly contact the embassy for appointments and information.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Tourism]
Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of PKR 3652/- /- per application
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash) for Pakistan.
The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
The visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
Kindly refer to schedule an appointment page on this website for detailed information

## Documents Required
i) Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists
Please check the list of required documents before submitting your application. This will minimise chances of rejection of your visa application due to incorrect or inadequate documents.
Visit of family members or friends 
*All supporting documents must not be older than 1 month

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit your application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General 
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure: 
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3 x 4 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Grup Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
- Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 15 working days, provided that a complete file is submitted. However, taking into account the additional days VFS needs to deliver/collect files at the Embassy, we recommend submitting your application at least 20 days before your intended date of departure. Please note: the processing time may extend to 45 days without specific reasons.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Pakistan.

## Download Forms
Please Click here  to fill the online Visa form.

The visa processing time is a minimum of 15 working days, provided that a complete file is submitted. However, taking into account the additional days VFS needs to deliver/collect files at the Embassy, we recommend submitting your application at least 20 days before your intended date of departure. Please note: the processing time may extend to 45 days without specific reasons.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Pakistan.

## Download Forms
Please Click here  to fill the online Visa form.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category; for more information on this, kindly refer to the documents required page.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Tourism]
Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of PKR 3652/- /- per application
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash) for Pakistan.
The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
The visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
Kindly refer to schedule an appointment page on this website for detailed information

## Documents Required
i) Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists
Please check the list of required documents before submitting your application. This will minimise chances of rejection of your visa application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
Business checklist 
*All supporting documents must not be older than 1 month

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit your application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General 
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa applicant submitted must measure: 
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3 x 4 (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes. Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Grup Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
- Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 15 working days, provided that a complete file is submitted. However, taking into account the additional days VFS needs to deliver/collect files at the Embassy, we recommend submitting your application at least 20 days before your intended date of departure. Please note: the processing time may extend to 45 days without specific reasons.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Pakistan.

## Download Forms
Please Click here  to fill the online Visa form.
